<!-- Maintainers: file concrete starter tasks with this template. The
     CONTRIBUTING.md "Good first issues" section enumerates the live set; copy
     one here and fill the pointers. Each must be doable WITHOUT a live printer
     and WITHOUT a purchased key — desk-only, validated against existing
     evidence + tests. -->

## Task

<!-- One or two sentences: what to do and what "done" looks like. -->

## Why it's a good first issue

<!-- Why this is self-contained: no hardware, no key, bounded blast radius, a
     clear green check. -->

## Where to look (pointers)

<!-- The minimum on-ramp. Fill these in. -->

- Read first: `AGENTS.md`, `docs/README.md`, `CONTRIBUTING.md`
- Files in scope:
- Relevant evidence (`docs/research/…`):
- Relevant test(s):

## Definition of done

- [ ] Change is desk-reproducible (no live printer, no key)
- [ ] `just check` is green
- [ ] `just test` is green
- [ ] If a protocol claim changed: evidence file + test updated together
      (CONTRIBUTING.md → Traceability)
- [ ] No new gitleaks findings (`just secrets-scan-dir`)

## Need help?

Ask in the issue thread. The `docs/README.md` "Start here" + the validated
runbook (`docs/runbook/g6020-native-reset.md`) are the fastest way to orient.
